Hello and welcome to the Never Spit the Difference Beyond the Book Virtual Course. The purpose of this course is to get you on track so you will be awesome. You get some key additional ideas we've been using since the book came out to supplement, amplify and go into even more depth and exercise the concepts from the book. Training includes ten separate courses with over fifty chapters and multiple exercise scenarios. Each of the ten courses correspond to a chapter from the book and will essentially follow the same general structure. We will introduce a subject for each course and define key concepts, terms and techniques. Some of the courses will have a guided example which we will work through together in order to see how these skills can be used in real life situations. These interactive questions are designed to keep your attention and keep you thinking critically about how to use the skills from the book in real life situations. The courses will end with a summary to recap the most important points and at the end there will be an interactive scenario where you will have to answer questions in order to successfully negotiate your desired outcome. Just as in the book, every course will build upon the other. This course will begin with the basics of negotiation and a little bit of history as to how I learned the skills I did. Let's get started.
